vector_description: An open-ended equity scheme predominantly investing in large-cap stocks. Suitable for investors looking for long-term wealth creation and willing to take high risk. Ideal for building a core, stable equity portfolio with India's biggest companies.

An open-ended equity scheme following a value investment strategy. It identifies and invests in stocks that are trading at a discount to their intrinsic value. Perfect for patient investors looking for outsized long-term returns.

A dynamic equity fund that invests across large, mid, and small-cap stocks based on market conditions. Suitable for investors who want the fund manager to actively shift allocations across market capitalizations for optimal growth.

An equity scheme focused exclusively on small-cap companies with high growth potential. Highly volatile but offers the potential for exceptional returns over a 7-10 year horizon. Strictly for investors with a very high-risk appetite.
Invests predominantly in mid-cap companies that are the potential large-caps of tomorrow. Offers a balance between the stability of large caps and the explosive growth of small caps.

A sectoral fund that invests in companies engaged in infrastructure and allied sectors like construction, cement, and energy. Suitable for investors looking to capitalize on India's capital expenditure boom.
An open-ended equity scheme investing in technology and IT sector companies. Suited for aggressive investors who want high growth and believe in the future of the Indian and global software industry.

scheme_name: ICICI Prudential Pharma Healthcare and Diagnostics (P.H.D) Fund
vector_description: Invests in pharmaceutical, healthcare, hospitals, and diagnostic companies. Acts as a defensive thematic play, suitable for investors wanting exposure to the growing healthcare sector.

scheme_name: ICICI Prudential Dividend Yield Equity Fund
vector_description: Invests primarily in dividend-yielding stocks. Designed for investors who seek capital appreciation along with the stability of regular dividend payouts from established companies.

scheme_name: ICICI Prudential ELSS Tax Saver Fund
vector_description: An open-ended Equity Linked Saving Scheme (ELSS) with a statutory lock-in of 3 years and tax benefit. Suitable for investors looking to save tax under Section 80C of the Income Tax Act while aiming for long-term capital appreciation.
A low-cost passive index fund that replicates the Nifty 50 Index. Ideal for beginner investors who want guaranteed market-linked returns without the risk of active fund manager underperformance.
A dynamic asset allocation fund that shifts between equity and debt based on market valuations. Perfect for investors who want equity exposure but are scared of market volatility and crashes.
An aggressive hybrid fund that invests 65-80% in equity and the rest in debt. Offers the high growth potential of equity while the debt portion provides a cushion against steep market falls.

A unique fund that invests across three or more asset classes like Equity, Debt, Gold, and Silver. Provides an all-weather portfolio for investors seeking ultimate diversification to protect against inflation.

A conservative hybrid fund that invests predominantly in debt instruments (75-90%) with a small exposure to equity. Ideal for retirees or conservative investors seeking stable returns marginally better than FDs.

Generates income by exploiting the price difference between cash and derivative markets. Offers returns comparable to liquid funds or FDs but is taxed as an equity fund, making it highly tax-efficient.

A debt fund that invests in very short-term market instruments. Ideal for parking idle cash or an emergency fund for a few weeks to months, offering better returns than a standard bank savings account with very low risk.

The safest category of mutual funds, investing in securities with a maturity of just one day. Completely immune to interest rate risk. Perfect for parking large sums of money for literally a few days.
Invests predominantly in highly rated (AA+ and above) corporate bonds. Suitable for investors looking for steady, predictable returns over a 2 to 3-year horizon without taking equity risks.

Invests strictly in government securities across various maturities. Carries zero default risk (sovereign guarantee) but is highly sensitive to RBI interest rate changes. Good for long-term debt allocation.

scheme_name: Amazon Pay ICICI Bank Credit Card
vector_description: A lifetime free co-branded credit card offering unlimited flat cashback on Amazon purchases (up to 5% for Prime members) and flat 1% cashback on other spends. Perfect for frequent online shoppers looking for a no-fee card.

A premium lifestyle credit card designed for frequent travelers. Offers international and domestic airport lounge access, complimentary golf rounds, and buy-one-get-one movie ticket offers on BookMyShow.
A mid-premium lifestyle credit card offering high-end perks. Includes welcome vouchers, complimentary railway and airport lounge access, 24/7 concierge services, and exclusive dining discounts.

An excellent entry-level credit card for everyday spends. Offers discounts on movie tickets, complimentary railway lounge access, and fuel surcharge waivers. Great for young professionals getting their first card.

A super-premium luxury credit card for high-net-worth individuals. Features unlimited global airport lounge access, a highly reduced foreign currency markup fee, and exclusive luxury concierge services.

scheme_name: ICICI Bank Platinum Chip Credit Card
vector_description: A completely lifetime free, basic credit card with no joining or annual fees. It provides basic reward points on spending and fuel surcharge waivers, making it the perfect hassle-free first credit card.

scheme_name: ICICI Bank HPCL Super Saver Credit Card
vector_description: A highly rewarding fuel credit card that offers significant cashback and reward points specifically on fuel purchases at HPCL pumps. Essential for individuals who commute heavily by car or two-wheeler.

scheme_name: MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card
vector_description: A premium travel co-branded card offering direct MakeMyTrip holiday vouchers and accelerated reward points on hotel and flight bookings. Includes complimentary MMT Black exclusive membership.

A unique co-branded card offering top-notch airport experiences. Provides heavy discounts on duty-free shopping, free flight cancellations, and complimentary premium 'Pranaam' meet-and-greet services at Adani airports.

An affinity card designed for football enthusiasts. Offers exclusive discounts on official Manchester United merchandise and top-tier match ticket packages, alongside standard dining and movie benefits.

scheme_name: ICICI Bank Campus Power Education Loan
vector_description: A comprehensive education loan designed for students pursuing higher education in India or abroad. Offers flexible repayment terms, pre-admission sanctions, and options for loans without collateral for premier institutes.
Provides financing for purchasing a new house or flat, or for construction. Features attractive interest rates, online sanctions with minimal documentation, and long repayment tenures up to 20 years.

scheme_name: ICICI Bank Step Up Home Loan
vector_description: A specialized home loan for young professionals. It offers enhanced loan eligibility and lower initial EMIs that gradually increase as the borrower's salary grows over the years.
Instant financing for purchasing a new car. Offers up to 100% funding on the on-road price for select models, with minimal documentation and quick digital approvals.

A specialized, discounted auto loan specifically for purchasing Electric Vehicles (EVs). Provides green incentives, lower interest rates, and extended repayment tenures to promote eco-friendly commuting.
Quick financing for motorcycles and scooters. Features up to 100% funding of the vehicle cost with instant digital sanctions to get commuters on the road immediately.
An unsecured, multi-purpose loan of up to ₹50 lakh. Requires no collateral and offers fast disbursals for medical emergencies, weddings, home renovations, or travel.

An instant overdraft facility linked directly to an ICICI salary account. Provides a financial safety net for unplanned expenses, allowing users to borrow short-term cash and pay interest only on the utilized amount.
A fast, secured loan obtained by pledging gold ornaments. Features minimal paperwork, rapid cash disbursal, and highly transparent valuation and storage policies.
A high-value secured loan where commercial or residential property is mortgaged. Ideal for business expansion, debt consolidation, or funding a child's higher education abroad.
A highly secure investment option offering guaranteed returns at fixed interest rates. Flexible tenure options ranging from 7 days to 10 years are available for steady wealth accumulation.

scheme_name: ICICI Bank Senior Citizen Fixed Deposit
vector_description: A specialized fixed deposit for individuals over 60 years old. It provides an additional premium interest rate over the standard FD rates to support a secure and higher-yielding retirement income.

scheme_name: ICICI Bank Tax Saver Fixed Deposit
vector_description: A fixed deposit specifically designed for tax deductions under Section 80C. It comes with a mandatory 5-year lock-in period, providing dual benefits of guaranteed interest returns and income tax savings.
A systematic saving plan that allows users to deposit a fixed amount every month. It earns interest comparable to an FD, making it perfect for salaried individuals building a corpus over time.

A highly flexible recurring deposit that lets users set specific life goals (like a vacation or a gadget). Users can deposit varying amounts whenever they have spare cash without any missed payment penalties.

scheme_name: ICICI Bank Foreign Currency Non-Resident (FCNR) Deposit
vector_description: A specialized term deposit for NRIs to maintain funds in foreign currencies (USD, GBP, EUR, etc.) protecting them from exchange rate fluctuations. The principal and interest are fully repatriable and tax-free in India.
An Indian Rupee denominated fixed deposit for NRIs. Income earned on this deposit is entirely exempt from Indian income tax, providing a high-yield, safe parking spot for foreign earnings.
A zero-balance savings account designed to provide basic banking facilities to everyone. Features no minimum balance requirement and free basic cash deposit/withdrawal services.

scheme_name: ICICI Bank Advantage Woman Savings Account
vector_description: A specialized savings account exclusively for women. Offers unique benefits like cashback on debit card spends, discounts on locker rentals, and comprehensive lifestyle privileges.

scheme_name: ICICI Bank Smart Star Savings Account
vector_description: A savings account designed specifically for minors aged 10-18 to operate independently. Features specialized debit cards with spend limits to help children learn financial independence safely.
